name: 28_Stock_Price_Prediction_LSTM_YahooFinance_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kujenga mfumo wa utabiri wa bei za hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance? Tafadhali safisha data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, na tumia dirisha la muda kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Mfano wa LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`, na upakiaji wa seti ya data, usafishaji, na ubadilishaji unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/predictions.txt` na tengeneza na hifadhi chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` kwa kutumia Plotly. Unda Jupyter Notebook yenye taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri na ihifadhi kama ripoti ya PDF katika `results/report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual LSTM implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual LSTM architecture (e.g., no `torch.nn.LSTM`, `keras.layers.LSTM`, or equivalent), no layers, no forward pass, and no training logic. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a real model. The trajectory evidence also confirms no actual LSTM implementation was recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the Yahoo Finance dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no import of `yfinance`, `pandas_datareader`, or any other library used to fetch Yahoo Finance data, and no actual API calls or file reads for stock price data are present.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of data cleaning, handling missing values, or outlier detection. Instead, it only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a dictionary with a string "loaded" and some notes, and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a static list. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions data cleaning as a text string but there is no actual code that performs these operations (e.g., no use of `dropna()`, `fillna()`, `interpolate()`, or any outlier detection logic). The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of a time window (sliding/rolling window) to convert time series data into a supervised learning problem. Instead, the file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with `load_dataset()` returning a dictionary with a string "loaded" and `build_transforms()` returning a list of strings. There is no real code for creating input sequences and target labels using a time window approach (e.g., no `create_sequences()` or similar function that uses a window size to generate X/y pairs from time series data).

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/predictions.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual stock price predictions. This indicates that real LSTM model predictions were never generated and saved to the file. The content does not contain any meaningful prediction data (e.g., predicted stock prices, dates, or numerical values), confirming that the requirement has not been genuinely fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` exists in the workspace, but its content is `('', None)` — indicating it is empty or was not properly generated. The trajectory evidence confirms that no steps related to creating interactive charts using Plotly or saving the `.html` file were recorded. Therefore, the requirement to generate interactive prediction result charts using Plotly and save them to `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` has not been fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `results/report.pdf` file exists in the workspace but its content shows `('Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file', None)`, indicating the file is empty and contains no actual content. Furthermore, the trajectory evidence confirms that no steps were recorded for creating a Jupyter Notebook with model architecture visualizations, training process, or prediction results, nor for converting such a notebook to PDF.
